title: How can I limit which emails appear in emails and activities?
excerpt: Sometimes, 1 client with 1 email address works on multiple deals at a time with us. If there are multiple items, how can I ensure the relevant emails go to the right items? I’m trying to avoid having all emails go into a…

posts.author: laurenr (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml: Sometimes, 1 client with 1 email address works on multiple deals at a time with us. If there are multiple items, how can I ensure the relevant emails go to the right items? I’m trying to avoid having all emails go into all the items and not sure if this is expected behavior/if there is a workaround. Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @laurenr!

Can you try filtering by item related activities?
